title: Proof Boundary — Capability from Ambiguity
supported_claims: Transformation environments routinely contain incomplete information, competing priorities, and changing constraints.
Structuring ambiguity through ownership, risk boundaries, feedback loops, and preserved learning can improve future decision capacity.
The draft distinguishes forced certainty from disciplined action under uncertainty.
unsupported_claims: Any universal claim that ambiguity always improves capability.
Any quantified claim about executive performance or transformation outcomes.
Any assertion that the six-step structure is the only valid ambiguity-conversion method.
